title: Fish Display
description: A simple mod that adds wooden plaques to display your caught fish. Supports all wood types and keeps the fish alive!
body:
# **Fish Display**
Show off your prized catches with style!
Tired of throwing your legendary catches into a dark chest? Fish Display introduces a simple, elegant way to showcase your fishing prowess on your walls.

## **🌲Native Wood Support**
Matches your build perfectly! The mod includes a unique plaque for every vanilla wood type, 

including:

-Oak, Spruce, Birch, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak

-Mangrove, Cherry, Bamboo

-Crimson & Warped (Nether woods)

-Also Now Including Stripped Varients Of All Wood Types

## **🐟 3D Living Models**
Unlike Item Frames which only show a flat, 2D texture, Fish Display renders the actual 3D entity model of the fish.

-Put a Pufferfish on the wall? It looks like the actual mob.

-Put a Tropical Fish Bucket on the wall? It renders that specific tropical fish variant.

## **🛠️ Infinite Mod Compatibility**
This is the best part: It works with almost everything.

The mod is designed to dynamically pull the entity data from the item you are holding. This means it has automatic support for other mods.

-Caught a specialized fish from Tide 2?

-Found a rare species in Aquaculture 2?

-Fishing in Upgrade Aquatic?

As long as the item has an entity associated with it (Raw Fish or Bucket), this mod will display it automatically. No configuration required.

## **🎮 How to Use**
1. Craft a Plaque: Use sticks in the corners, logs on the sides, and planks in the center.

2. Place it: Stick it on any wall.

3. Display: Right-click the plaque with any Raw Fish or Fish Bucket.

4. Retrieve: Right-click again with an empty hand to take your fish back (it keeps its data!).

 

Created by TheWhiteGuy
